name: Budget setup & editing
description: Implement household budget setup and editing. Backend: POST /api/v1/budgets (admin-only; create monthly budget for a period — year+month, total amount required, optional per-category sub-budgets array keyed by global category key), GET /api/v1/budgets?period=YYYY-MM (return current period budget with per-category breakdown), PATCH /api/v1/budgets/:id (update total or sub-budgets; records change in audit). Per-category budget rows reference the global static category catalog from feat-016 and should be limited to categories whose catalog `kind` is `expense`. Frontend: Budget Setup page (period selector, total budget input, expandable per-category budget rows populated from the global expense-category catalog), and a Budget Summary card on the household dashboard showing period and total. Per docs/product-specs/budget-management.md. Does NOT include spend tracking or threshold alerts (feat-027).
